claim: OpenAI's Dime hardware device reportedly uses behind-the-ear metallic earbuds with external pill-shaped device for vision and audio
actionable: Monitor emerging AI device form factors; earbuds + external sensor device appears to be the preferred pattern for continuous AI interaction

claim: Earbuds + external device form factor is superior to glasses because it keeps processing power external while maintaining voice/audio interface
actionable: When designing AI wearables, prioritize audio interface with external processing over vision-heavy glasses
